title: Charred Malaysian Chicken Claypot
description: A traditional Malaysian dish featuring charred, juicy chicken cooked in a claypot with Chinese five spice powder, nostalgic and tamasic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the coconut oil in the claypot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook until fragrant.
Add the chicken to the claypot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the Chinese five spice powder, soy sauce, fish sauce, and brown sugar to the claypot and stir to combine.
Transfer the claypot to the preheated oven and cook for 25 minutes.
Remove the claypot from the oven and stir in the chopped scallions and sesame oil.
Return the claypot to the oven and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the claypot from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
